docs.text: Buffalo Chicken Sandwich # Serves Total Time 6 10.00 hours Ingredients # 3 chicken breast 6 hamburger buns 1.5 cup buttermilk 1 tbsp Tapatío hot sauce some cooking oil 1.5 cup flour 0.5 tsp salt 1 tsp cayenne pepper 6 tbsp butter 6 tbsp Frank’s hot sauce some ranch dressing 6 tsp mayonnaise Cookware # 1 medium bowl 1 medium bowl 1 paper towel 1 medium saucepan Instructions # Step 1 # Cut chicken breast into sizes that will fit on hamburger buns. Then slice chicken horizontally to make them thinner Note slicing makes the chicken more tender than pounding Note aim for 1/2 inch thickness Step 2 # Mix the buttermilk and Tapatío hot sauce in a medium bowl. Add the chicken, cover, and refrigerate at least 10 hours (overnight). Note replace Tapatío with Frank’s for a sweeter outcome Step 3 # When ready to cook cooking oil to 360 F. Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, mix flour, salt, and cayenne pepper together. Note replace cayenne pepper with paprika for a sweeter outcome Step 4 # Remove the chicken from the buttermilk mixture and let excess liquid fall off. Dip the chicken in the flour mixture, then back in the buttermilk, then back in the flour. Step 5 # Add the chicken to the heated oil and fry until cooked through and golden brown, about five minutes, flipping halfway through. Remove from the heat and set on a paper towel. Step 6 # To make the buffalo sauce, use a medium saucepan. Melt the butter and stir in Frank’s hot sauce. Step 7 # Meanwhile, toast the buns in the toaster until the interior of the bun is golden and crispy. Set aside. Note Don’t forget to set toaster to bagel mode Step 8 # Smear both sides of the bun with some ranch dressing . Once the chicken has fried, toss it in the buffalo sauce and place it in the sandwich. Top with mayonnaise . Serve immediately. Note Enough ranch fully cover the bun but not enough to pour off Note About 1tsp per sandwich, place mayo in tiny chunks since spreading is impossible due to buffalo sauce Source https://www.thespruceeats.com/buffalo-chicken-sandwich-2937545
docs.title: Buffalo Chicken Sandwich

docs.text: Serves Total Time 6 10.00 hours

docs.text: Panda Express Orange Chicken # Serves Total Time 8 35 minutes Ingredients # 2 lb chicken 1 tbsp salt 1 tsp white pepper 1 cup cornstarch 3 cup flour 1 egg 1.5 cup water 2 tbsp oil Cookware # 1 cutting board 1 medium mixing bowl 1 heavy bottom pan 1 paper towel-lined plate Instructions # Step 1 # On a cutting board, cut chicken into 1x1-inch (2x2-cm) cubes and set aside. Step 2 # In a medium mixing bowl, combine salt, white pepper, cornstarch, and flour. Whisk to combine. Step 3 # Add the egg, water, and oil until it reaches the consistency of pancake batter. Step 4 # Add the chicken to the batter and refrigerate at least 30 minutes. Step 5 # Heat oil in a wok or heavy bottom pan to 350˚F (180˚C). Step 6 # Gently add the chicken and cook for 5 minutes or until lightly golden brown. Step 7 # Remove the chicken from the pan and transfer to a paper towel-lined plate. Source # https://tasty.co/recipe/original-orange-chicken-by-panda-express
docs.title: Panda Express Orange Chicken

docs.text: Panda Express Orange Sauce # Serves Total Time 8 0 minutes Ingredients # 1 tbsp oil 0.25 tsp red pepper flakes 0.5 tsp ginger, minced 1 tbsp garlic, minced 0.25 cup sugar 0.25 cup brown sugar 0.25 cup orange juice 0.25 cup white distilled vinegar 2 tbsp soy sauce 2 tbsp cornstarch 2 tbsp water 1 tsp sesame oil Cookware # 1 heavy bottomed pot Instructions # Step 1 # Set a heavy bottomed pot over medium - high heat and add the oil. Step 2 # Once the oil begins to shimmer, add the red pepper flakes, ginger, minced, and garlic, minced, and cook for 30 seconds, stirring constantly. Step 3 # Add the sugar and brown sugar, and stir to combine. Step 4 # Add in the orange juice and allow the sugars to begin to dissolve in the liquid, stirring occasionally. Step 5 # Add in the white distilled vinegar and soy sauce, and stir to combine. Step 6 # Add the cornstarch and water together and whisk to combine. Add to the pan and stir. Step 7 # Continue to cook the sauce until maple syrup consistency is achieved. Step 8 # Add in the fried chicken and stir until completely coated in the sauce. Step 9 # Top with sesame oil. Source # https://tasty.co/recipe/original-orange-chicken-by-panda-express

docs.text: Baked Potato Soup # Serves Total Time 1 10 minutes Ingredients # 2 slices bacon 0.11 cup margarine 0.11 cup flour 1.17 cup milk 0.67 large baked potatoes 0.67 green onions 0.2 cup shredded cheddar cheese 0.17 cup sour cream 1 salt, 1 pepper Cookware # 1 large skillet 1 stock pot Instructions # Step 1 # Place bacon in a large skillet. Cook over medium heat until browned. Drain, crumble, and set aside. Step 2 # In a stock pot, melt margarine over medium heat. Whisk in flour until smooth. Gradually stir in milk, whisking constant until thickened. Stir in large baked potatoes and green onions. Bring to a boil, stirring frequently. Step 3 # Reduce heat to low, and simmer for 10 minutes. Mix in bacon, shredded cheddar cheese, and sour cream. Then add salt, and pepper to taste. Continue cooking, stirring frequently until cheese is melted.

docs.text: Borsch # Serves Total Time 6 0 minutes Ingredients # 3 medium beetroots 3 medium potatoes 3 items carrots 2 tbsp olive oil 8 cups chicken broth 2 cups water 2 tbsp olive oil 1 medium onion 2 items celery 1 small bell pepper 3 tbsp tomato paste 1 can cannellini beans 2 items bay leaves 2 tbsp white vinegar 1 tsp salt 4 tsp black pepper 1 glove garlic 3 tbsp dill Cookware # Instructions # Step 1 # Peel, grate and/or slice beetroots, potatoes and carrots. Keep sliced potatoes in cold water to prevent browning until ready to use then drain. Step 2 # Heat a large soup pot of 5L or larger over medium/high heat and add olive oil. Add grated beets and sauté 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until beets are softened. Step 3 # Add chicken broth and water. Add sliced potatoes and sliced carrots then cook for 10-15 minutes or until easily pierced with a fork. Step 4 # While potatoes are cooking, place a large skillet over medium/high heat and add olive oil. Add finally chopped onion, celery and bell pepper. Saute stirring occasionally until softened and lightly golden for 7-8 minutes. Add tomato paste and stir fry 30 seconds then transfer to the soup pot to continue cooking with the potatoes. Step 5 # When potatoes and carrots reach desired softness, add cannellini beans with their juice, bay leaves, white vinegar, salt, black pepper, pressed garlic, and chopped dill. Simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes and add more salt and vinegar to taste.

docs.text: Neapolitan Pizza # Serves Total Time 6 0 minutes Ingredients # 820 g tipo zero flour 533 ml water 24.6 g salt 1.6 g fresh yeast 3 cans chopped tomato 3 cloves garlic 3 tbsp dried oregano 18 leaves fresh basil 3 packs parma ham 3 packs mozzarella Cookware # Instructions # Step 1 # Make 6 pizza balls using tipo zero flour, water, salt and fresh yeast. Put in a fridge for 2 days. Step 2 # Set oven to max temperature and heat pizza stone for about 40 minutes. Step 3 # Make some tomato sauce with chopped tomato and garlic and dried oregano. Put on a pan and leave for 15 minutes occasionally stirring. Step 4 # Make pizzas putting some tomato sauce with spoon on top of flattened dough. Add fresh basil, parma ham and mozzarella. Step 5 # Put in an oven for 4 minutes.

docs.text: Olivier Salad # Serves Total Time 6 0 minutes Ingredients # 1 kg corn beef 3 medium potatoes 3 medium carrots 1 cup frozen peas 4 eggs 6 pickles 1 cup mayonnaise 1 tbsp dill Cookware # Instructions # Step 1 # Zero step is cook corn beef. Put into a large pan and simmer for 2 hours. Step 2 # The first step is to cook your potatoes and carrots. I used a steamer, but you can always go the traditional route and boil them. In either case, peel the carrots but not the potatoes. Step 3 # Steam the potatoes for 30 minutes to start with, and then add the peeled carrots. Continue steaming for 10-15 more minutes, or until the potatoes and carrots are firm but tender when poked. Step 4 # Meanwhile, cook your frozen peas according to package directions. I use the kind that can be steamed in the package in the microwave. When they are done, set them aside to cool. Step 5 # When the potatoes and carrots are done, allow them to cool to the point that you can handle them easily. Step 6 # Peel the potatoes. Using your fingers or the back of a knife, gently scrape the thin layer of skin off of the potatoes. Dice them into 1cm cube-ish shapes and put them into a medium serving bowl. Step 7 # Next, dice your carrots. I’ve heard it said that a Soviet housewife could be judged on her housekeeping skills by how finely she could dice vegetables for her soups and salads. I, however, won’t judge you. In fact, if you chop your potatoes and carrots a little larger, I would probably even thank you. I happen to like chunky salads. Step 8 # Toss the carrots and a cup of steamed peas into the bowl with the potatoes. Step 9 # Peel and dice your hardboiled eggs. Again, I know some like to have their salads with finely diced ingredients, but I don’t. So dice them however you like. Step 10 # Chop pickles finely. I used small snacking dill pickles, so I needed to use six of them. If you have larger pickles, try using three and see if that is enough for you. Step 11 # Add the meat if using and mix everything together gently before you add the mayonnaise. Step 12 # Stir in one cup of mayo to start with, and add more if you think that the salad needs more binding together. Step 13 # Cover the salad and chill for at least one hour or overnight to allow the flavors to come together. And of course, garnish with finelly chopped dill. This is a Russian salad, after all.
docs.title: Olivier Salad

docs.text: Potstickers # Serves Total Time 4 0 minutes Ingredients # 75 g strong white flour 75 g plain flour 75 ml just-boiled water 2 tsp salt 1 tbsp olive oil 100 g Chinese cabbage 50 g carrot 3 items spring onions 75 g strained kimchi 2 tbsp soy sauce 1 tbsp rice wine vinegar 1 tbsp chilli oil 1 tsp sesame oil 3 tbsp olive oil Cookware # Instructions # Step 1 # Let’s first make some dough. Set kettle with some water and prepare strong white flour and plain flour. Step 2 # Put the flours into a bowl. Mix the just-boiled water with the salt, then add this to the flour, mixing it in with a knife. It will seem very floury to start with but keep going and it will come together. Don’t be tempted to add more water. Cover with a damp cloth for 10 minutes, then remove and knead until the dough is smooth and elastic. Cover the dough again and leave it to stand somewhere warm for an hour. Step 3 # Cut the dough into 2 equal pieces and dust your work surface with flour. Roll the dough out as thinly as you can. It will be resistant to start with, but you will eventually end up with a round about 35cm in diameter and with a thickness of less than 1mm. Step 4 # Cut the dough into rounds using a 9cm cutter, then repeat with the other piece of dough. Knead the offcuts together and roll again. You should end up with at least 24 discs. Dust with flour in between each one if you want to stack them together. Step 5 # Heat the olive oil in a frying pan and gently cook very finely shredded and chopped Chinese cabbage, very finely grated carrot and finely chopped spring onions until they have wilted down. Remove from the heat and stir in very finely chopped strained kimchi. Taste for seasoning and add salt and pepper if you think it necessary. Allow to cool. Step 6 # Assemble the dumplings by putting a teaspoon of filling in the centre of each wrapper. Wet around the sides – thoroughly, as they can sometimes crack – then pinch the edges together, pleating from the middle down each side to seal. Step 7 # Make the dipping sauce by mixing soy sauce, rice wine vinegar, chilli oil and sesame oil together. Taste for seasoning and add salt if necessary. Step 8 # To cook, heat olive oil in a non-stick frying pan that has a lid – you need just enough oil to thinly cover the base. Add some of the dumplings, making sure they are well spread out. Step 9 # Fry the dumplings over a medium heat until they are crisp and brown underneath, then add water – just enough to thinly cover the base of the pan. Cover the pan quickly, as it will spit when you add the water, and steam the dumplings for 5 minutes, until they are starting to look translucent and the water has evaporated. Uncover and cook for a further minute to make sure the underside is still crisp. Remove and keep warm while you cook the rest. Serve hot with the dipping sauce.
docs.title: Potstickers

docs.text: Serves Total Time 4 0 minutes

docs.text: Root Vegetable Tray Bake # Serves Total Time 4 0 minutes Ingredients # 300 g carrots 300 g beetroots 300 g celeriac 1 tbsp olive oil 1 pinch salt 1 pinch pepper 2 items red onion 1 tbsp olive oil 1 pinch salt 2 springs thyme 1 tbsp olive oil 15 g butter 1 large onion 1 tsp dried sage 1 item lemon 150 g breadcrumbs 1 item egg 150 ml cider 1 tsp Dijon mustard 1 tsp redcurrant jelly 1 tsp Marmite 150 ml vegetable stock 400 g cannellini beans Cookware # Instructions # Step 1 # Preheat the oven to 200C/Fan 180C/Gas 6. Step 2 # Arrange carrots cut lengthways, beetroots cut into wedges and celeriac cut into wedges in a large roasting tin and drizzle with olive oil. Step 3 # Season with salt and pepper, then roast for 20 minutes and then remove from the oven. Step 4 # Toss red onion wedges in olive oil and season with salt, then add the onions and thyme to the tin and put it back in the oven for another 20 minutes. Step 5 # Meanwhile, make the sage and onion balls. Heat olive oil and butter in a frying pan, add finely chopped onion and cook until soft and translucent. Add the dried sage and zest of lemon, then remove the frying pan from the heat. Step 6 # Tip the mixture into a bowl and add the breadcrumbs, then season well and stir in the egg. Form the mixture into 8 balls. Step 7 # Whisk cider, Dijon mustard, redcurrant jelly, Marmite and heated vegetable stock together and set aside. Step 8 # Remove the roasting tin from the oven and sprinkle the drained cannellini beans over the veg. Pour over the sauce. Step 9 # Arrange the balls on top, then roast for another 15–20 minutes until the balls are cooked through and browned and the sauce has reduced – it should be syrupy and should have formed a sticky glaze on the top of the vegetables. Step 10 # Serve with something green, perhaps a large bowl of peas.
docs.title: Root Vegetable Tray Bake

docs.title: Step 10

docs.text: Sicilian-style Scottadito Lamb Chops # Serves Total Time 4 0 minutes Ingredients # 8 large lamb chops 2 cloves garlic 1 tsp fennel seeds 2 springs fresh oregano 1 splash extra virgin olive oil 1 pinch salt 1 pinch ground cinnamon 1 lemon 1 salt some black pepper Cookware # Instructions # Step 1 # Light the barbecue and let it get nice and hot. Make sure the bars of the barbecue are clean and free from any burnt on residue. Step 2 # Take the lamb chops out of the firdge and place on a plate to come up to to room temperatur. Meanwhile… Step 3 # Peel the garlic. Bash the fennel seeds in a pestle and mortar until fine. Step 4 # Pick and add the leaves from fresh oregano, the garlic, extra virgin olive oil and salt and bash again. Step 5 # Stir in the ground cinnamon, zest the lemon over the top and mix again. Tip into a roasting tray and spread out. Step 6 # Lightly splash the fat in several places along the chops. Step 7 # Place the chops in one layer on a board, season well with salt and black pepper then bash and flatten slightly with the base of a small saucepan. Step 8 # Transfer the chops to the roasting tray, then turn over in the marinade to coat, then leave to marinate for around 30 minutes. Step 9 # When the bars of the grill are nice and hot, drop the chops onto the hot side and sear on botth side for 2 minutes, or until browned all over (move the chops away from any flamse that appear). Step 10 # Cut the lemon in half with a clean knife, and squeeze over the chops for the last minute of cooking, then transver to a plate to rest before serving.
docs.title: Sicilian-style Scottadito Lamb Chops

docs.text: Snack Basket I # Serves Total Time 8 0 minutes Ingredients # 100 bags black tea 6 bottles water some apple lattice square 1 profiteroles, 3 biscuites with hearts some breakfast biscuites 2 choclate bars 3 crisps some apple crisps 1 dates, some dried apricotes some dried plums 1 pistachio, some pumkin seeds 2 cans tinned pineapples 1 crackers Cookware # Instructions # Step 1 # Take black tea, water, apple lattice square, profiteroles, biscuites with hearts, breakfast biscuites, choclate bars, crisps, apple crisps, dates, dried apricotes, dried plums, pistachio, pumkin seeds, tinned pineapples, crackers and place them on a tray. Enjoy slowly!

docs.title: Step 1

docs.text: Easy Pancakes # Serves Total Time 2 0 minutes Ingredients # 3 eggs 125 g flour 250 ml milk 1 pinch sea salt some olive oil Cookware # Instructions # Step 1 # Crack the eggs into a blender, then add the flour, milk and sea salt, and blitz until smooth. Step 2 # Pour into a bowl and leave to stand for 15 minutes. Step 3 # Melt the butter (or a drizzle of olive oil if you want to be a bit healthier) in a large non-stick frying pan on a medium heat, then tilt the pan so the butter coats the surface. Step 4 # Pour in 1 ladle of batter and tilt again, so that the batter spreads all over the base, then cook for 1 to 2 minutes, or until it starts to come away from the sides. Step 5 # Once golden underneath, flip the pancake over and cook for 1 further minute, or until cooked through. Step 6 # Serve straightaway with your favourite topping.
docs.title: Easy Pancakes

docs.title: Step 6

docs.text: Mexican Style Burrito # Serves Total Time 6 0 minutes Ingredients # 2 tins cannellini beans 2 garlic clove 1 tbsp olive oil 1 item red chilli 2 tins tinned tomatoes some red onion 10 cherry tomatoes 1 bunch coriander 75 g cheddar cheese some lime some lime 2 avocados 1 pinch ground cumin some sea salt some black pepper 6 large tortillas 2 fresh red chilli 30 g butter 8 large eggs some salt some black pepper 200 ml sour cream 1 pinch smoked paprika Cookware # Instructions # Step 1 # Preheat your oven to the lowest setting. Drain the cannellini beans in a sieve. Place a saucepan on a medium heat. Step 2 # Peel and dinely slice the garlic clove. add the olive oil and sliced garlic to the hot pan. Step 3 # Crubmle the red chilli into the pan, then stir and fry until the grlic turns golden. Step 4 # Add the tinned tomatoes and drained cannellini beans to the pan, reduce to a low heat and simmer gently for around 20 minutes, or until reduced and nice and thick. Meanwhile… Step 5 # Peel, halve and finely chop the red onion. Roughly chop the cherry tomatoes. Finely chop the coriander stalks and roughly chop the leaves. Step 6 # Coarsely grate the cheddar cheese. Cut lime in half and the other lime into six wedges. Step 7 # Cut the avocados in half lengthways, use a spppon to sccoop out and dicard the stone, then scoop the fles into a bowl to make your guacamole. Step 8 # Roughly mash the avocado with the back of a fork, then add the onion, cherry tomatoes, coriander stalks and ground cumin. Season with sea salt and black pepper and squeeze in the juice from one of the lime halves. Step 9 # Mix well then have a taste of your guacoamole and tweak with more salt, pepper and lime jouice until you’ve got a good balance of flovours and its tasing delicious. Set aside. Step 10 # Loosely wrap the tortillas in tin foil then pop in the hot oven to warm through, along with two plates. Finely chop the fresh red chilli and put it aside for later. Step 11 # Make your table look respectable - get the cutlery, salt and pepper and drinks laid out nicely. Step 12 # By now your beans should be done, so have a taste and season with salt and pepper. Turn the heat off and pop a lid on th pan sothey stay nice and warm. Step 13 # Put a small non-stick saucepan on a low heat. Add the butter and leave to melt. Meanwhile… Step 14 # Crack the eggs into a bowl, add a pinch of salt and black pepper and beat with a fork. When the buter has melted, add the eggs to the pan. Stir the eggs slowly with a spatula, getting right into the sides of the pan. Cook gently for 5 to 10 minutes until they just start to scramble then turn the heat off - they’ll continute to cook on their own. Step 15 # Get two plates and pop a warm tortilla on each one. Divide the scrambled eggs between them then top with a good spoonful of you home-made beans. Step 16 # Scatter each portion with grated cheese and as much chilli as youdare, then roll each tortilla up. Step 17 # Spoon guacamole and sour cream on top of each one, scatter with coriander leaves and dust with a little smoked paprika. Serve each portion with wedge of lime for squeezing over, and tuck in.
docs.title: Mexican Style Burrito

docs.text: Beetroot, feta & grain salad # Serves Total Time 4 0 minutes Ingredients # some mixed leaves 100 g marinated feta 400 g tub beetroot salad 250 g pouch cooked mixed grains some olive oil Cookware # Instructions # Step 1 # Put mixed leaves, marinated feta, tub beetroot salad and pouch cooked mixed grains in a large bowl and toss together with some seasoning. The olive oil in the feta will create a dressing for the salad.

docs.text: Caprese Salad # Serves Total Time 2 0 minutes Ingredients # 3 medium tomatoes 2 packs mozzarella 0.5 cup fresh basil some flaky salt some black pepper 2 tbsp extra virgin olive oil 2 tbsp balsamic glaze Cookware # Instructions # Step 1 # Place the tomatoes and mozzarella on a platter. Arrange tomatoes and mozzarella on a platter in an alternating pattern. Step 2 # Top with the fresh basil. Scatter the basil leaves over the tomatoes and mozzarella. Step 3 # Season with flaky salt and black pepper. Sprinkle with a generous pinch of flaky salt and several grinds of black pepper, to taste. Step 4 # Drizzle with the extra virgin olive oil and balsamic glaze. Drizzle the olive oil and balsamic glaze over the tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil. Serve immediately.
docs.title: Caprese Salad
